title: ReefNet: Global Coral Reef Image Annotation Dataset (v1.0)
abstract: ReefNet is a large-scale, taxonomically enriched collection of annotated coral reef images compiled from many CoralNet sources worldwide, built for training and benchmarking machine-learning coral classification models. It includes a consolidated global label set, per-source metadata, and a dedicated Red Sea test partition (the 'RSG-TestDataset') contributed by Red Sea Global, collected in the Al-Wajh lagoon (~26.4N, 36.4E) in 2022 and used as a held-out evaluation set in the ReefNet paper. The dataset as a whole is global in scope; only the RSG-TestDataset partition is Red-Sea-specific.

spatial.resolution: image/point-annotation level (site coordinates only for the RSG-TestDataset partition)

variables.name: label
variables.label: Coral/Substrate Label
variables.description: Consolidated ReefNet label for the annotated image patch (coral genus/morphotype or substrate category).

resources.name: Overview of CoralNet sources for image download

variables.name: Source
variables.label: CoralNet Source Name
variables.description: Name of the CoralNet source/project the images were compiled from.

variables.name: ImagesNumber
variables.label: Image Count
variables.description: Number of annotated images available for the source.

resources.name: RSG-TestDataset annotations (Al Wajh lagoon, Red Sea)

variables.name: name
variables.label: Source Image Filename
variables.description: Original underwater image filename, embeds a capture date (e.g. IMG_1582_20220317.JPG).

variables.name: patch_path
variables.label: Annotation Patch Path
variables.description: Path to the extracted image patch corresponding to a point annotation.

variables.name: label
variables.label: Point-Annotation Label
variables.description: Substrate/taxon label assigned to the annotation point (e.g. Hard substrate, Turf Algae, Shadow).

access.how_to_request: Publicly downloadable from Hugging Face (https://huggingface.co/datasets/ReefNet/ReefNet-1.0); a local mirror is kept in the KAUST Ecological data folder. No approval needed for the public HF release; contact the maintainer for questions.

provenance.originator: ReefNet Project / King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST)
provenance.citation: Battach, Y., Nieuwenhuis, B.O., Li, X., et al. ReefNet: A Large-scale, Taxonomically Enriched Dataset and Benchmark for Coral Reef Classification. arXiv preprint, 2025.

known_issues: Only the RSG-TestDataset partition (17,870 point annotations across images captured 2022-03) is confirmed Red-Sea-specific; the bulk of the ~2.7 GB All_ReefNet_annotations.csv covers reef sites worldwide and was not filtered to the Red Sea for this catalog entry.

n_rows for All_ReefNet_annotations.csv and several metadata/label-mapping files were not counted (multi-GB file, no spreadsheet-reading tool available in this environment) -- left as 0/unknown, verify before publishing.
arXiv preprint citation ID was blank in the source README ('arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX') at time of cataloging; DOI intentionally left null.

access.tier set to 'public' based on the Hugging Face release and CC BY-NC-SA license, but the copy inside KAUST - DATA may be an internal working mirror -- confirm before treating the local file paths as externally shareable.
